html:
Exclusive to:  
This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift

The Dreadstone Outcrop is a mineable object in Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It appears on top of the first Nightmare Fissure that a player approaches while there is an active Shadow Rift.

The Outcrop spawns the Ink Blights (Shriek, Rasp, Jitters, and Rictus) if the player gets too close. In addition, the outcrop is surrounded by Miasma, like the rift itself. The structure remains so long as the three Ink Blights are alive, or until the player leaves the area. After the death of the creatures, the outcrop disappears if it has not been mined, leaving no items. After the Ink Blights are defeated no new outcrops can spawn for three days.

The Dreadstone Outcrop is considered too hard for most tools and requires a Pick/Axe, Brightshade Smasher, Brightshade Bomb, or a Werebeaver with The Werebeaver III Skill to mine. When mined, it drops three Dreadstone.

Tips

  • It is easiest to wait until only one Ink Blight is alive to mine the Outcrop for its Dreadstone.
  • Wearing the Brightshade Helm prevents being slowed while in the Miasma, while wearing the Void Cowl prevents damage from the Miasma. Whichever trait is more useful to mine the Outcrop can depend on if the player is trying to dodge attacks while mining, or if enemies are distracted. Regardless, the Miasma does not deal too much damage in the time it takes to mine the Outcrop.
  • Winona with Enlightened Strike Skill can also use Planar Strike to mine the Dreadstone Outcrop.

Trivia

  • The Dreadstone Outcrop was introduced in the Terrors Below update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“It's coming from deep down in those chasms...”
–Wilson
“It's growing from way down below.”
–Willow
“Scary rock comes from scary place...”
–Wolfgang
“Do I dare imagine what kind of darkness it grew from?”
–Wendy
“IF I COULD JUST GET TO THE SOURCE!”
–WX-78
“Its source must lie even deeper underground.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't like where this is going, and I really don't like where it's comin' from.”
–Woodie
“It comes from the depths below.”
–Maxwell
“It hails fröm a place deeper and darker than even here.”
–Wigfrid
“More of that scary rock...”
–Webber
“More of that curious stone.”
–Warly
“Growing up, up, up!”
–Wormwood
“Must be a lot of the stuff growing down there.”
–Winona
“Who knows where it grows from?”
–Wortox
“Oooh, big shiny rock!”
–Wurt
“I bet there's more buried deep underground!”
–Walter
“It's coming from deep below the surface.”
–Wanda

The '''Dreadstone Outcrop''' is a mineable object in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. It appears on top of the first [[Nightmare_Light/DST#Nightmare_Fissure|Nightmare Fissure]] that a player approaches while there is an active [[Shadow Rift]].

The Outcrop spawns the [[Ink Blight]]s ([[Shriek]], [[Rasp]], [[Jitters]], and [[Rictus]]) if the player gets too close. In addition, the outcrop is surrounded by [[Miasma]], like the rift itself. The structure remains so long as the three Ink Blights are alive, or until the player leaves the area. After the death of the creatures, the outcrop disappears if it has not been mined, leaving no items. After the Ink Blights are defeated no new outcrops can spawn for three days.

The Dreadstone Outcrop is considered too hard for most tools and requires a [[Pick/Axe]], [[Brightshade Smasher]], [[Brightshade Bomb]], or a [[Woodie/Don't_Starve_Together#Werebeaver|Werebeaver]] with {{picDark|24|The Werebeaver III}}''[[Woodie/Don't_Starve_Together#The_Werebeaver|The Werebeaver III]]'' Skill to mine. When mined, it drops three [[Dreadstone]].

== {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* It is easiest to wait until only one Ink Blight is alive to mine the Outcrop for its Dreadstone.
* Wearing the [[Brightshade Helm]] prevents being slowed while in the Miasma, while wearing the [[Void Cowl]] prevents damage from the Miasma. Whichever trait is more useful to mine the Outcrop can depend on if the player is trying to dodge attacks while mining, or if enemies are distracted. Regardless, the Miasma does not deal too much damage in the time it takes to mine the Outcrop.
* [[Winona/Don't_Starve_Together|Winona]] with [[Enlightened Strike]] Skill can also use Planar Strike to mine the Dreadstone Outcrop.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Dreadstone Outcrop was introduced in the [[From Beyond#Terrors Below|Terrors Below]] update.
